creator: rob.kruus@gmail.com
text:
I found a related issue here:
http://ffmpeg.org/pipermail/ffmpeg-devel/2016-October/201958.html
where libressl defines a version of openssl that it does not support.

Using their solution with the redefining OPENSSL_VERSION seems to work and also fixing for the lower version of OpenSSL see:
https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns/issues/4338

No testing done here, just a successful build with the patches.
